title: Command descriptor path fragments
description: Reusable JSON Schema fragments for MCP and daemon command descriptors that carry CanonicalPath or scoped Unity MCP paths.

boundedReadOptions.description: Bounded text read options. Omitted max_chars uses the implementation default and hard caps remain implementation-enforced.

boundedWriteOptions.description: Bounded text write options for knowledge/artifact workflows. text length must fit both caller and implementation caps.

boundedListOptions.description: Bounded list/glob options. Omitted max_entries uses the implementation default and hard caps remain implementation-enforced.

boundedGlobPattern.description: Scope-relative bounded glob pattern using / separators. It may contain * and ? wildcards but cannot express absolute paths, traversal, ADS, trailing dot/space components, or encoded separators.

canonicalRelativePath.description: Lexically clean non-empty project-relative path using / separators, with no absolute, drive-relative, empty, dot, or dot-dot components. Filesystem security still belongs to CanonicalFS.

allOf.description: Additional Unity MCP scoped path lexical policy: no ADS colon, trailing dot/space components, encoded separators, or double-encoded separators.
Artifact scope-relative path. Implementations resolve this below Library/SGGUnityMcp.

packageManifestPath.description: Exact project-relative Unity package manifest files accepted by the package_manifest scope.

allOf.description: Knowledge scope-relative path. Implementations resolve this below Assets/UnityMcpKnowledge.
